trigger: keep target\debug\cockpit-tools.exe as the active Cockpit app process; launch npm run tauri dev when debug is absent, and only prebuild before stopping an already-running non-debug Cockpit process
stopSemantics: create stop.signal to stop watchdog; no release fallback is started unless -EnableReleaseFallback is set; existing non-debug cockpit-tools app processes are preserved until debug prebuild succeeds or debug is already running; never kill Codex processes
